NAVARE XIX 39/18
BARENTS SEA
1.AREA TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION DUE TO ROCKET
CARRIER ELEMENTS FALL 25 AND 26 APR FROM 1730 TO 1930 UTC.
  A. 74-23.6N 025-39.3E
  B. 74-27.0N 027-34.0E 
  C. 74-01.7N 028-39.5E
  D. 73-33.6N 027-52.5E 
  E. 73-30.3N 026-03.6E 
  F. 73-54.9N 024-56.3E
2.CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 262030 UTC APR 18
